---
title: "advantage_and_disadvantage_math"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("./_packages_and_environments.R")
source("./_variables_and_functions.R")

# Housekeeping
post.num <- tracker$posts[basename2(this.path())]$Post.num
fig.dir <- create.fig.dir(post.num)
ability.gen <- "Standard Array"

# Data
roll.list <- copy(test.roll)
for (abrev in names(rollType.abrevs)) {
  roll.list[[abrev]][, Type := rollType.abrevs[abrev]]
}
dt <- rbindlist(roll.list)
dt[, Roll := as.integer(Roll)]
dt[, Type := factor(Type, levels = rollType.lvls)]
means <- sapply(raw.roll, mean)
medians <- sapply(raw.roll, median)
avg.dt <- data.table(
  Value = c(means, medians),
  Average = c(rep("Mean", length(means)), rep("Median", length(medians))),
  Type = factor(c(rollType.abrevs[names(means)], rollType.abrevs[names(medians)]), levels = rollType.lvls)
)

# Aesthetics
# 
```


```{r}
ggplot(dt, aes(x = Roll, y = Hit.wgt)) + 
  geom_col(aes(fill = Type), position = "dodge", alpha = 0.25, color = NA) +
  geom_vline(
    data = avg.dt, 
    aes(xintercept = Value, color = Type, linetype = Average), 
    linewidth = 1, 
    alpha = 0.75
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), n.breaks = 10, limits = c(0, 0.1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:20, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Roll type", values = rollType.colors) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Roll type", values = rollType.colors) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  labs(x = "d20 Roll", y = "Chance")
```

```{r}
ac.range <- 8:18
pc.lvl <- 3
atk.mod <- primary.attack.bonus(level = pc.lvl, ability.gen.method = ability.gen)
dmg.mod <- primary.attack.mod(level = pc.lvl, ability.gen.method = ability.gen)

plot.dt <- lapply(rollType.lvls, function(type) {
  lapply(ac.range, function(ac) {
    res.dt <- make.attack(
      roll.type = type, 
      AC = ac, 
      atk.bns = atk.mod, 
      dmg.dice = "1d8", 
      dmg.bns = dmg.mod, 
      by.hitType = TRUE
    )
    res.dt[, `:=`(Target.AC.min.atkBns = {ac - atk.bns}, Roll.type = type)]
    return(res.dt)
  }) %>% rbindlist()
}) %>% rbindlist()
plot.dt[
  , `:=`(
    Hit.type = as.factor(Hit.type, levels = hitType.lvls), 
    Roll.type = as.factor(Roll.type, levels = rollType.lvls))
]
ggplot(plot.dt, aes(x = Target.AC.min.atkBns, ymin = Dmg, ymax = Dmg)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(width = {Wgt / max(Wgt)} * 0.9, color = Hit.type), position = "dodge") +
  scale_color_manual(values = hitType.colors)
  
```
